code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
mut in_word = false
mut first_word = true

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9
    if in_word
      in_word = false
    end
  else
    if not in_word
      if not first_word
        result = "#{result} "
      end
      first_word = false
      in_word = true
      if b >= 97 and b <= 122
        let upper = b - 32
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(upper)}"
      else
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    else
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
